tasks.title: Tasks

bulk.archive_hint: Deletion is unavailable — tasks can only be archived. Restore from archive (Supervisor role or above).

taskDetail.report_empty_desc: Once the assignee completes the task and uploads a report, it will appear here
taskDetail.photo_required_missing: Photo is required but not attached

taskDetail.subtasks_empty_desc: Add subtasks to describe the execution steps
taskDetail.history_empty_desc: No events recorded for this task yet
taskDetail.transfer_dialog_desc: Select a new assignee. The task can be transferred when In progress or Paused.
taskDetail.archive_dialog_desc: Select the archive reason. The task will be hidden from the main list. It can be restored from the Archive section (Supervisor role or above).
taskDetail.status_override_dialog_desc: Force status change. NETWORK_OPS only. This action will be logged in audit.
taskDetail.status_override_justification_placeholde: Specify the reason for the status change (min 10 chars)...

taskForm.assignment_permission_hint: Any eligible worker on shift can claim this task first
taskForm.chain_label: Chain: hand off to next assignee on completion
taskForm.chain_hint: After the current worker completes this task, it will automatically be created for the next assignee
taskForm.requires_photo_hint: Worker will not be able to complete without a photo report
taskForm.override_hint_disabled: Override is available to regional manager / network director / operator only

organizationSettings.page_subtitle: Brand, policies, timezone, API, billing, legal entities

general.type_readonly_hint: Organization type is locked after initial setup
general.name: Public name

ai_standards.fmcg_description: Set thresholds for AI anomaly detection. If actuals exceed the threshold — a task suggestion is generated.
ai_standards.fmcg_baseline_hint: If no threshold is set — AI uses network average as baseline.
ai_standards.fashion_description: Set seasonal periods by product type — that is all. Discount sizes are determined automatically by AI.
ai_standards.fashion_baseline_hint: Discount sizes are determined automatically — starts with standard ladder and adapts based on past discount results.
ai_standards.ai_disabled_alert: AI module is not connected. Standards can only be set with an active subscription.

legal.description: Multiple legal entities within one organization (for retail networks with multiple legal entities)
legal.no_entities_desc: Add the first legal entity for this organization
legal.archive_confirm_message: The entity will be hidden from the list. Data will be preserved.

policies.acceptance_policy_desc: Applied to new tasks if not selected manually
policies.auto_accept_hours_desc: If MANUAL task stays in ON_REVIEW longer than N hours — auto-accepted

timezone.tz_hint: Timezone applies to all UI and task deadline calculations

api.revoke_confirm_message: The API key will be immediately deactivated. All integrations using it will stop working.
api.no_keys_desc: Create your first API key for integrations
api.key_success_warning: Save the key — it is shown only once

billing.cancel_confirm_message: Access to paid features will end at the end of the paid period. Data will be preserved.

states.forbidden_subtitle: Only NETWORK_OPS can configure organization settings

freelance_section.payment_mode_locked_hint: This parameter is fixed by the contract with Beyond Violet. Contact support to change.

platform_admin.edit_payment_mode_warning_description: Changing the mode affects financial operations. Open applications may lose connection to active payouts.

lama.title: LAMA
lama.description: Source of truth: employees, stores, planned shifts

excel.title: Excel import
excel.upload_dialog_desc: Select data type and upload a CSV or XLSX file
excel.drop_hint: Drag & drop or click to select

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.description: HTTP notifications for task and shift events
webhooks.add_dialog_desc: Enter URL and select events to subscribe

nominal_account.title: Nominal account
nominal_account.description: Payment service for freelance contractors. Holds 5% commission, generates closing documents.

ai_sources.section_subtitle: These sources power the AI analytics module. Without them, suggestions will be less accurate
ai_sources.hint_demo_alert: The AI assistant is running in demo mode on static data. For real suggestions, connect at least POS and Inventory.
ai_sources.connector_sftp_download_templates: Download CSV templates for client developers
ai_sources.connector_sftp_hint: Share this archive with the client's developers. They will populate the templates with data from their system and upload them on schedule to this SFTP. Our system will automatically detect and connect the sources.
ai_sources.connector_api_note: For large clients with their own systems (1C, ERP). Which data we receive via this key — will be marked by our developers after setup. Just access here.
ai_sources.connector_universal_desc: One access = multiple data sources automatically. Supports 2 connection modes — API key and file-based (CSV via SFTP). File mode is the most practical for most clients.

pos.title: POS (Checkouts)
pos.description: Receipt tape — who buys what in real time. Used for OOS forecasting and promo analysis.

inventory.title: Shelf inventory
inventory.description: SKU-level stock levels. Powers OOS forecasting and slow-mover detection.

supply.title: Supply chain
supply.description: Delivery schedule and incoming goods. Lets AI predict OOS risk before the shelf empties.

promo.title: Promo activities
promo.description: Promo calendar, prices, planograms. AI suggests shelf tasks ahead of promo launches.

marketing_channel.title: Marketing channel
marketing_channel.description: Where to automatically post approved promotions with photos after task completion.
marketing_channel.note: In the admin we only see the fact 'sent to channel X'. The actual publication (post format, images, tags, discount price) is handled by the backend / external marketing platform.
marketing_channel.field_name: Channel name (shown to worker in task)

empty.no_entries_subtitle: Actions will appear here as the system runs

export.max_rows_warning: Too many records — refine filters (max 10,000 rows at a time)

ai_banner.text: This month completion rate grew by 2.1 p.p. driven by improvements in SPAR Tomsk stores. Weak point — return rate at Food City Lenin Ave 217 (8.2% vs 5% norm). Possible causes: new staff, insufficient training.
